title: Psychotria willdenowii
taxonomy: Psychotria willdenowii is classified within the family Rubiaceae. This family is a large and diverse group of flowering plants commonly known as the coffee or madder family. Psychotria willdenowii is further classified within the genus Psychotria, which comprises over 170 species of plants native to tropical regions around the world. The genus Psychotria is part of the order Gentianales, a group of flowering plants that also includes the families Apocynaceae and Loganiaceae. intro: Psychotria willdenowii, also known as Wild Coffee or Willd's Psychotria, is a perennial plant native to Central and South America, belonging to the Rubiaceae family. The health benefits of Psychotria willdenowii include its potential to act as an anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial agent, which may help alleviate symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and other health issues.
